problem: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.

You have to choose a number between 1 and @max@. If you choose the same number as another agent would, you both win. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.

You and a friend have to meet in @city@ tomorrow at noon. Your phone broke so you cannot communicate with him. Where would you go at noon? Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.

You and a friend have to pick a color between @colors@. You cannot communicate with him. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.

You have to choose a day of the week to meet a @agent@. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.

You have to split $@money@ with another person. You cannot communicate with this person. If you choose the same amount, you win that much money. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
